sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53211" key="*kappw/tas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Καππώτας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, Ζεὺς Κ</foreign>., Doric name given to a large unworked stone at Gythium on which Orestes was said to have sat down and recovered his sanity (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">παύσασθαι τῆς μανίας</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:22:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22.1</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
